description: Quaternion, Euler Angles, Rotation Vectors and Rotation Matrices - There is no industry standard on rotation parametrization? But why? In my bachelor thesis, and the accompanying interactive tool, I analyse & visualise the varying properties and resulting use cases of rotation parametrizations.

image-gallery.description: Euler angles describe orientation as three consecutive rotations.

image-gallery.alt: Image: Quaternion represented as a rotation around an axis by a given angle
image-gallery.description: The exponential map converts an axis-angle rotation-representation into a quaternion.
The columns of a rotation (/transformation) matrix describe where the transformed x, y and z vector are pointing.

image-gallery.alt: Summary Table of Properties of Rotation Parameterizations
image-gallery.description: Summary of the properties of rotation parameterizations
